using System;
using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public sealed class BenchmarkContext
{
    public required string Repository { get; init; }
    public required string Model { get; init; }
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
    public double Score(double[] values) => values.Where(double.IsFinite).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Average();
}

public sealed class BenchmarkResult
{
    public BenchmarkContext Context { get; }
    public double Score { get; }
    public string Status { get; } // "Completed", "Failed", "Skipped"
    public string? Error { get; }

    public BenchmarkResult(BenchmarkContext context, double score, string status, string? error = null)
    {
        Context = context;
        Score = score;
        Status = status;
        Error = error;
    }
}

public sealed class ResumableBenchmarkRunner
{
    private readonly string _stateFile;
    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, BenchmarkResult> _completedResults = new();
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _modelServerLock = new(1, 1); // Ensures one heavy model server at a time
    private readonly TimeSpan _watchdogTimeout = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(30); // Configurable watchdog

    {
        _stateFile = stateFilePath;
        LoadState();
    }
